item.title: tty
item.description: +osc § In Mosh, SSH_TTY is left as is and points to a dead TTY. unset SSH_TTY in .zprofile or read tty from tmux display-message -p '#{pane_tty}' in a nested tmux session.

item.title: starship
item.description: Configuration § Set format to skip slow modules, instead of disabling them individually. For example, I’m using # ~/.config/starship.toml format = '$username$hostname$directory$git_branch$git_commit$git_state$git_metrics$git_status$hg_branch$character'.

item.title: lispy
item.description: Key Bindings § Slurp: > Barf: < Clone: c Forward: ] Backward: [ Jump to matching pair: d Split: M-j Join: + Insert § Parens: ( Braces: { Brackets: } Quotes: " LispyVille § As described in https://github.

item.title: Zsh
item.description: New User Setup § You should not edit anything between these lines if you intend to run zsh-newuser-install again. You may, however, edit any other part of the file.

item.title: Zero's Garden
item.description: Welcome to my digital garden, where I keep notes of my thoughts and knowledge about topics I’m interested in like computer science. Notes are loosely grouped into topics and interconnected, and there is no strict hierarchy.

item.title: Sideloading Blink with AltStore
item.description: Build from Source § Provisioning profile “iOS Team Provisioning Profile: …” doesn’t support the Associated Domains, Fonts, iCloud, and Push Notifications capability.

item.title: AltStore Verification Code
item.description: Code from “Get a Verification Code” does not work with AltStore. If you add your Apple ID to Xcode accounts and verify it once, verification code can be skipped in AltStore.

item.title: iTerm2 Copy Mode
item.description: To copy text from iTerm2 with keyboard only, press s-S-c to activate copy mode. In copy mode, press v, V or C-v to toggle selection by character, line, or rectangle, similar to Vim’s Visual mode.

item.title: AWS Map
item.description: Networking § The AWS Backbone Network connects AWS Regions, Availability Zones, and the Internet. VPC is a SDN built for AWS powering isolated virtual networks.

item.title: Public Cloud Map
item.description: Architecture Exploration § AWS Map Microsoft Azure Map Google Cloud Map Nitty-Gritty § AWS Pitfalls .
